## Citations (1)

* * *

> ... We applied a gaze-directed referring object detection method proposed in our previous work \[33,34\] for grasping the object that the human participant is looking at. In particular, a gazedirected visual grounding network (GVGNet) is proposed for the simultaneous Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) and Referring Expression Segmentation (RES) tasks. ...
